tasks.spec: You are a minimal wire-capture probe worker for the Ringer Engine spend-cap. Boundary: write only inside your current task directory; touch nothing else. Goal: create a file named marker.txt containing exactly one line: xrunid probe ok. That is the entire task — one real (free-tier) model call so Feeder logs this worker request; the fleet then verifies the baked X-Run-Id header landed on the request row. Do not add anything else.
tasks.check: grep -qx 'xrunid probe ok' marker.txt && echo 'marker.txt correct' || { echo 'FAIL: marker.txt missing or wrong'; exit 1; }
tasks.verified: marker.txt exists and is exactly the one expected line; the point is the accompanying real feeder request carrying the baked X-Run-Id header
